chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-1778 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 27.11.2025 Mr. Noor-ul-Haq Qureshi, advocate for petitioners Mr. Sajid Soomro, advocate for respondent(s) Ms. Shamim Mughal, Assistant Attorney General *** At the very outset learned counsel for the petitioners submits that he would be satisfied and will not press the petition if directions are issued to Grievance Redressal Committee to decide the appeal against rejection of objections regarding tentative seniority list of Deputy Manager (Technical) (BS- 18) as on 19.05.2022 (Available at page-319 to 325 of the Court’s file) in accordance with law within a period of one month. Learned Assistant Attorney General and counsel for respondent(s) extended no objection to this proposition. Ordered accordingly. Copy of this order be communicated to respondents for compliance. JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
